legal: BYO-original. This manifest ships METHODS/OFFSETS ONLY and patches the user's OWN, legally-obtained APK in their browser (in RAM). No copyrighted game bytes are distributed.

native.comment: In-place ARM byte-patches on lib/armeabi-v7a/libgame.so. Each patch is verified against `expect` (first bytes at `off`) before writing, so a different/wrong libgame.so aborts loudly. RET_YES = mov r0,#1;bx lr  RET_NO = mov r0,#0;bx lr.

dex.comment: DEX byte-patch infra works (in-place same-size patch + Rust→WASM Adler32/SHA-1 recompute, see wasm/). BUT the MINIMAL tilt fix (force-register @0x43fc46 38000b00->00000000 + neuter unregister @0x43fca4 6300b943->0e000000) was DEVICE-TESTED and CRASHES: forcing register makes the game's original onSensorChanged forward to the NATIVE onSensorChanged(FFFJ) before libgame.so binds it -> UnsatisfiedLinkError. The proper fix needs a try/catch around the native call (what the apktool full-fix does) = a DEX code-item REWRITE (new exception handler, size change) — NOT a same-size byte-patch. That's the next Rust→WASM job (dex code-item editing). Patches disabled until then; the CLI build (build/apply_patches.py) keeps the working full tilt fix.

androidManifest.comment: Binary AXML edit: add HIGH_SAMPLING_RATE_SENSORS for the tilt fix on some hardware. TODO: test whether it is DROPPABLE (tilt may work without it), since editing binary AXML in-browser is non-trivial.

addFiles.comment: Optional power feature (NOT needed to 'just play'): the libmod.so ImGui mod menu + its System.loadLibrary('mod') inject into GameActivity.<clinit>. Deferred for the browser patcher.
